whatsNew: Rebuilt Functional Skills questions against the official Department for Education subject content for England.
Maths and English Level 1 now use straightforward real-life applications at the stated level.
Maths and English Level 2 now use more complex connected reasoning at the stated level.
Expanded each Functional Skills Maths and English assessment to 20 questions.
Changed Academy and Trade Academy assessments to a one-question-per-slide layout.
Selecting an answer no longer advances automatically: Confirm is required before the next slide.
Added Previous controls, question counters and progress bars to assessments.
